portability_tests.description: A fresh project-owner ChatGPT export with 12 explicit numbered conversation members is validated and cryptographically bound offline; one explicitly selected conversation is projected through the accepted IMP-059 mapping, reviewed publication, generic export, and shutdown-escape path while imported content remains external data only.

limitations: Synthetic CI uses only non-private fixtures; the accepted project-owner result is stored separately as privacy-safe content-free evidence.

The complete numbered member set is sequentially validated and cryptographically bound, while only the explicitly selected bounded projection enters the IMP-059 mapping, publication, generic export, and shutdown-escape path.

Two identityless conversation records are quarantined by count without synthetic identities; one auxiliary unknown-provider-field object is quarantined in the selected projection and reported as material loss, so no full-fidelity claim is made.

ZIP ingestion, automatic directory discovery, attachment-byte recovery, account restoration, sidebar restoration, memory migration, GPT migration, settings migration, subscription migration, file restoration, workspace migration, target-specific export, and round-trip fidelity remain outside this evidence.
The complete Phase 6 gate and stable general anti-lock-in remain incomplete.
